design_note: n=13 INVEST cohort: 4 historical SCS-CC2 jobs (Hz_NH23, Hz_DMAC1_NPh21_CF31, Hz_NPh22_SO2Ph1, Hz_POZ1_NPh21_CF31) using adc2_batch2_final / hf_calcs geometries (gnorm 6.6e-5 to 7.6e-4); 9 new Phase 2 SCS-CC2 jobs using delta_dft converged geometries (gnorm 5.6e-5 to 1.5e-4). All geometries within historical convergence baseline.
